title: Nice Admin Tools
description: User-friendly & lightweight Admin Tools with intuitive menu navigation. Great for Admins, Operators, and Map Makers.
body:
## 📖 Description Adds simple, lightweight admin tools to the game, all managed through an easy-to-use menu - no commands required. Perfect for admins, operators, and map makers.
Command To Access The Menu ``` /function admin_tools ```
![Main Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bbd9832bf278e1485964b29a960f455ae075bb4.png) ## 📋 Features
Ban/Kick Player Easily ban or kick players who are not welcome.

![ban-kick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64cfd7d0e8b228299f4d0f92a102f2a7587e9aa9_0.webp)
Broadcast Message Easily broadcast messages to the whole server via chat, action bar or as a title.

![broadcast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fef908c340ba752de31e42e05ff8658f851cab1_0.webp)
Change Time Change the time of the day.

![change-time](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58a5b99143bfe5ffc3f02aeb1be26d95720dfd4d_0.webp)
Change Weather Change the weather for a specific amount of time.

![change-weather](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bffaf0b59199b6f0008a053679e1935063c06379_0.webp)
Clear Entities Easily and quickly clear Items, Boats or other entities from your world/server.

![clear-entities-menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d2a6c2c06a849b5eec8ef369d7ea77660811130_0.webp) ![clear-entities-other](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8743297c31994d7f73e065dbef01d85cfb11d392_0.webp)
Creative Mode Enter Creative Mode with a blank inventory. Your gamemode, inventory and position from before entering will be saved and restored when you leave Creative Mode.

![creative-mode](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f831168421e31a153358042e0159fc1434b6156_0.webp)
Data Pack Settings Shortcuts to the settings menus included in our other data packs.

![datapack-settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c1594d3b9c6b96494ea0a009641dd3cd31dbde8_0.webp)
Entity Count Count entities in a specific radius or all currently loaded or track them over a period of time.

![entity-count-main](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/305e36e31a3770fcd2ba9fd2b9841c24dc999215_0.webp) ![entity-count-current](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b2b4f82c148484e65909023262a9b7b75237eee_0.webp) ![entity-count-tracked](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a51e7202efbdc2475aab32394a0bb167d0c8842_0.webp)
Game Rules View and change the difficulty and game rules.

![gamerules](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a6c86cea1809803bad7c1b667996cec0e112d95.png)
Inspect Player Get details about a specific player. Includes Positions, Gamemodes, Inventory, Enderchest Items and various other infos.

![inspect-player-menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10e3b7e1ccc1853d1f97539bc3d41e7aa1edf348_0.webp) ![inspect-player-output](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7db2fef7f947381381afef8d2b3731e608f30a14_0.webp)
Item Displays A basic Item Display editor - quickly create, modify or remove previous created Item Displays.

![item-display-menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee3e0bcc756ed31b175e018e963f5e22cf8f5954_0.webp) ![item-display-create](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a2c54d6b3760dfe623d2eeee29b7ca9e2dc7709_0.webp)
Mannequins/NPCs A basic Mannequin editor - quickly create, modify or remove previous created Mannequins.

![mannequin-menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d766099e4ac5216a9624c8de7273c62ed92a4221_0.webp) ![mannequin-create](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/574838684faab569f23b2bc57cfe47cb5b2c7d06_0.webp)
Mob Spawner Quickly create basic Mob Spawners.

![mob-spawner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6805e73d208fcdf94e233f96ac19676809799a6_0.webp)
Spectate Spectate a player quickly.

![spectate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b655acbae891cdecc295174b6f99037503216a71_0.webp)
Text Displays A basic Text Display editor - quickly create, modify or remove previous created Text Displays.

![text-display-main](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cffb76ddf476be77d028211ce155cf4ac2dc9902_0.webp) ![text-display-create](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c989ff95ae4d36585ac000a30c37638e515d142b_0.webp)
## 🛠️ Technical Gibberish For **PaperMC users**, it is recommended to set the `paper.maxChatCommandInputSize` property to a value between 512 and 1024. More information can be found in the [PaperMC Docs](https://docs.papermc.io/paper/reference/system-properties/#papermaxchatcommandinputsize). Also make sure to have `allow-non-player-entities-on-scoreboards` enabled in your paper configs. ## ✍️ Feedback, Questions & Suggestions We're here to help! If you happen to have questions, suggestions or just encountered a bug, then feel free to hop on our discord server to ask for help in our **Data Pack Section**. [Click to join the server](https://discord.gg/f2pMggfgVv) ## 🎮 Explorer's Eden SMP Join **[A Realm Recrafted](https://modrinth.com/server/a-realm-recrafted)**, our Minecraft SMP! Enjoy a world featuring all of our (actively maintained) data packs, as well as some exclusive ones. It’s completely free without any microtransactions. Come build, explore, and craft with us today!
